final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity showcase for the 染秋 (RAN QIU) fragrance brand.

Style/medium: needs a "东方美学" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink wash tradition, 故宫文创 contemporary heritage design, Kinfolk magazine minimalist editorial style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-panel or unified layout showing primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications
Subject: must include the 染秋 (RAN QIU) brand identity elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: must reflect autumn tones inspired by 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" for typography demonstration
Constraints: must clearly distinguish primary color, secondary color, and font specifications in the presentation
Avoid:
